title: Hex$ Function
description: Hex$ returns a string representing the specified number in hexadecimal format. Each character is from 0-9 or A-F. Hex$ is especially useful for examining the results of the Stat function.
see_also:
Str$

Stat

Val

Hex$ Function Example

> print
				hex$
			(stat(0))

A00000

> print
				hex$
			(255)

FF
